message.content:
@startuml
participant "TodoListApplication" as App

participant "ToDoListGUIController" as GUIController

participant "ToDoList" as ToDoList

participant "Item" as Item

participant "AddItemController" as AddItemController

participant "EditItemController" as EditItemController

participant "LoadFileController" as LoadFileController

participant "ToDoListManager" as ToDoListManager

App --> GUIController : start()
App --> ToDoListManager : main()

GUIController ..> ToDoList : <Item> todoList
GUIController ..> ToDoListManager : ToDoListManager tdm
GUIController ..> ToDoList : ToDoList
GUIController ..> ToDoListManager : loadTable(ToDoListManager tdm)

GUIController --> ToDoList : <Item> tableView
GUIController --> ToDoList : TableColumn<Item, String> completionColumn
GUIController --> ToDoList : TableColumn<Item, String> nameColumn
GUIController --> ToDoList : TableColumn<Item, String> descriptionColumn
GUIController --> ToDoList : TableColumn<Item, String> dueDateColumn
GUIController --> ToDoList : RadioButton showAllItems
GUIController --> ToDoList : RadioButton showIncompletedItems
GUIController --> ToDoList : RadioButton showCompletedItems

GUIController --> ToDoListManager : changeItemViewOnRadioToggle()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : toggleCompletionOnButtonPress()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : removeItemFromTable()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : clearAllItemsFromTable()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : saveListToFile()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : popupAddItemSceneOnButtonPress()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : popupEditItemSceneOnButtonPress()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : changeToLoadFileSceneOnButtonPress()
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : closeWindowOnExitButtonPress(MouseEvent event)
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : initialize(URL location, ResourceBundle resources)
GUIController --> ToDoListManager : loadTable(ToDoListManager tdm)

GUIController --> AddItemController : <Item> todoList
GUIController --> AddItemController : ToDoListManager tdm
GUIController --> AddItemController : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
GUIController --> AddItemController : Item newItem = new Item()
GUIController --> AddItemController : getitemInfo(MouseEvent event)

GUIController --> EditItemController : <Item> todoList
GUIController --> EditItemController : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
GUIController --> EditItemController : edititemInfo(MouseEvent event)
GUIController --> EditItemController : showitemInfo(Item selecteditem)

GUIController --> LoadFileController : <Item> todoList
GUIController --> LoadFileController : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
GUIController --> LoadFileController : getFilePath(MouseEvent event)

ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : String fileLocation
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : ToDoList tdl = new ToDoList()
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : File file = new File(getFileLocation() + "/") + getFileName()
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : writeFile(String file, ToDoListManager manager)
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : loadToDoList(String location)
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : String getFileLocation()
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : String getFileName()
ToDoListManager --> ToDoList : String createList(String title)

ToDoList --> ToDoListManager : List<Item> itemList = new ArrayList<>()
ToDoList --> ToDoListManager : clearList()
ToDoList --> ToDoListManager : addItem(Item newItem)
ToDoList --> ToDoListManager : displayCompletedItems(List<Item> displayList)
ToDoList --> ToDoListManager : displayIncompletedItems(List<Item> displayList)

Item --> Item : String completion
Item --> Item : String name
Item --> Item : String description
Item --> Item : String dueDate
Item --> Item : Item()
Item --> Item : Item(String name, String description, String dueDate, String completion)
Item --> Item : String getName()
Item --> Item : String getDescription()
Item --> Item : String getDueDate()
Item --> Item : String getCompletion()
Item --> Item : changeCompletion()

AddItemController --> ToDoListManager : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
AddItemController --> ToDoListManager : Item newItem = new Item()
AddItemController --> ToDoListManager : getitemInfo(MouseEvent event)

EditItemController --> ToDoListManager : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
EditItemController --> ToDoListManager : edititemInfo(MouseEvent event)
EditItemController --> ToDoListManager : showitemInfo(Item selecteditem)

LoadFileController --> ToDoListManager : ToDoListManager tdm = new ToDoListManager()
LoadFileController --> ToDoListManager : getFilePath(MouseEvent event)

@enduml
